checks.evidence: Direct HR/RR, ECG, ACC, device status, and backend health streams stay on the provider; derived breath, HRV, and coherence streams stay on processors.
Direct HR/RR, ECG, and ACC streams include source-device and host timestamp domains.
Raw ECG/ACC ownership is exclusive per source; HR/RR dual receiver mode is represented separately.
Provider supports synthetic, replay, desktop, mobile, and headset wireless backend IDs, with synthetic and replay fixture selections.
Damaged command fixtures cover permission, raw stream ownership, unsupported stream, backend missing, timeout, and malformed frame cases.
Raw PMD host comparison uses serial release/acquire handoffs with timing, settings, source timestamp, and host timestamp evidence fields.

Sanitized live completion evidence preserves single-owner raw PMD acquisition, headset reacquire, desktop-owned ACC sample-rate success, control-session failure classification, and HR/RR observer-only behavior.
Coherence golden fixtures recompute the spectral paper ratio separately from the normalized operator score.
